chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Civil Rev. Application No.S-223 of 2018 Date Order with signature of Judge 1. For orders on CMA No.1667/2018 2. For orders on CMA No.1669/2018 3. For hearing of main case 4. For orders on CMA No.1668/2018 25-03-2019 Mr. Safdar Ali Bhatti, Advocate for the applicant.-.-.-. -.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Learned counsel for the applicant under instructions does not press this revision application as according to him the possession of the subject property has been obtained by the respondents in execution application. Accordingly, this revision application stands dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. JUDGE Suleman Khan/PA
